data.title: Expect APT to bounce to $0.95 from $0.86 as RSI is at 25.58, showing oversold conditions. Possible range $0.91-$0.95 if $0.84 support holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Aptos (APT) is currently valued at $0.86, showing a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 25.58, indicating it is in oversold territory. According to technical analysis, there is a possibility of a price rebound to a range between $0.91 and $0.95 if the support level at $0.84 is maintained.

data.title: ARB price could bounce to $0.125-$0.14 by March 2026. Currently at $0.10 with RSI at 25.12, a 25-40% recovery is possible in 4-6 weeks.
data.description: The stock of ARB is currently valued at $0.10, indicating extreme oversold conditions with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 25.12. Based on technical analysis, there is a potential for a 25-40% increase, reaching a resistance zone between $0.125 and $0.14, over the next 4-6 weeks.

data.title: Mowi ASA: NOK 1.50 ex-dividend issued today.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has surged to 6.2% in the last month, which is a significant increase from the previous rate of 5.5%. Additionally, it was reported that there were 2.5 million job losses in the same period, a worrying trend that is causing concern among policymakers. The data also showed that the labor force participation rate has decreased to 61.8%, indicating that fewer people are actively looking for work. The grim statistics highlight the challenges faced by the economy as it continues to grapple with the effects of the ongoing pandemic.

data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently trading at $1.00 amid bearish momentum, but there is potential for a rally to $1.20 if it can surpass the resistance at $1.04.
